_说明: Northwind Digital 品牌介绍片旁白(英文,am_michael 暖声)。通俗版。正好 8 段,与 8 镜一一对应。改这里的文字即可换配音。S E O / A I 拆开写是为了 TTS 念准。
vo: This is Northwind — digital marketing and A I consulting that turns your vision into real growth.
Going global gets messy fast: high acquisition costs, unclear localization, and data scattered everywhere.
Northwind is your A I-first digital agency — one team for strategy, design, technology, and growth.
We cover the full stack: web and S E O, custom software, branding, social, media distribution, even business and visa setup — all powered by our own A I.
Why teams choose us: A I-first, data-driven, global-ready, and honest about what actually works.
Our process is simple. We discover your goals, build the strategy and ship it, then keep optimizing together.
The result? Faster go-to-market, multilingual content at lower cost, and brands that look world-class.
Let's build something great together. Tell us your goals — and we'll craft the right solution.
_说明_zh: 中文版旁白(CosyVoice 同嗓克隆念中文)。VO_LANG=zh 时用这组。画面仍为英文。
vo_zh: 这里是 Northwind，做数字营销和 AI 咨询，把你的愿景变成实实在在的增长。
出海，往往很快就乱了套：获客成本高、本地化没头绪、数据散落各处。
Northwind 是你的 AI 优先数字代理，策略、设计、技术、增长，一个团队全包。
我们覆盖全栈：建站与 SEO、定制软件、品牌广告、社交媒体、媒体分发，甚至公司注册和签证，全部由我们自研的 AI 驱动。
为什么大家选我们：AI 优先、数据驱动、面向全球，而且对什么真正有效，诚实不忽悠。
流程很简单：先摸清你的目标，制定策略并落地交付，再一起持续优化。
结果是什么？上市更快，多语言内容成本更低，品牌看起来世界级。
一起做点了不起的事吧。告诉我们你的目标，我们来打造合适的方案。
